version_history.author: Drafter
version_history.change_summary: Initial draft with 6 core clauses covering definitions, license grant, fees, support, term, and governing law.

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.text: In this Agreement, 'Licensor' means AlphaCode Inc, 'Licensee' means BetaApps LLC, 'Software' means the enterprise resource planning platform described in Exhibit A, and 'License Fee' means the annual fee specified in Section 3.

clauses.title: License Grant
clauses.text: The Licensor grants the Licensee a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Software for the Licensee's internal business operations for the duration of this Agreement.

clauses.title: License Fees
clauses.text: The Licensee shall pay the License Fee of $50,000 per annum, due within thirty (30) days of each anniversary of the Effective Date. Late payments shall accrue interest at 1.5% per month.

clauses.title: Technical Support
clauses.text: The Licensor shall provide Level 1 and Level 2 technical support during business hours (9 AM to 5 PM EST, Monday through Friday) with a maximum initial response time of four (4) hours for critical issues.

clauses.title: Term and Termination
clauses.text: This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for an initial term of three (3) years. Either party may terminate this Agreement upon sixty (60) days written notice.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of laws provisions.

version_history.author: Counterparty
version_history.change_summary: Counterparty requests extended support hours and adds a confidentiality clause.

clauses.title: License Fees

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.text: In this Agreement, 'Licensor' means AlphaCode Inc, 'Licensee' means BetaApps LLC, 'Software' means the enterprise resource planning platform described in Exhibit A, and 'License Fee' means the annual fee specified in Section 3.

clauses.title: License Grant
clauses.text: The Licensor grants the Licensee a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Software for the Licensee's internal business operations for the duration of this Agreement.

clauses.title: License Fees
clauses.text: The Licensee shall pay the License Fee of $50,000 per annum, due within thirty (30) days of each anniversary of the Effective Date. Late payments shall accrue interest at 1.5% per month.

clauses.title: Technical Support
clauses.text: The Licensor shall provide Level 1 and Level 2 technical support during extended business hours (8 AM to 8 PM EST, Monday through Friday) with a maximum initial response time of four (4) hours for critical issues.

clauses.title: Term and Termination
clauses.text: This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for an initial term of three (3) years. Either party may terminate this Agreement upon ninety (90) days written notice.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of laws provisions.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Each party shall maintain the confidentiality of all proprietary information received from the other party for a period of five (5) years from disclosure.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.text: Neither party shall be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages. The total aggregate liability of either party shall not exceed the total License Fees paid in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

version_history.author: Counterparty
version_history.change_summary: Counterparty modifies payment terms and adds acceptance testing clause.

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.text: In this Agreement, 'Licensor' means AlphaCode Inc, 'Licensee' means BetaApps LLC, 'Software' means the enterprise resource planning platform described in Exhibit A, and 'License Fee' means the annual fee specified in Section 3.

clauses.title: License Grant
clauses.text: The Licensor grants the Licensee a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Software for the Licensee's internal business operations for the duration of this Agreement.

clauses.title: License Fees
clauses.text: The Licensee shall pay the License Fee of $50,000 per annum, due within thirty (30) days of each anniversary of the Effective Date. Late payments shall accrue interest at 1.5% per month.

clauses.title: Technical Support
clauses.text: The Licensor shall provide Level 1 and Level 2 technical support during extended business hours (8 AM to 8 PM EST, Monday through Friday) with a maximum initial response time of four (4) hours for critical issues.

clauses.title: Term and Termination
clauses.text: This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for an initial term of three (3) years. Either party may terminate this Agreement upon ninety (90) days written notice.

clauses.title: Payment Processing
clauses.text: All invoices issued under this Agreement shall be paid within fourteen (14) business days of receipt. The Licensor shall issue invoices quarterly in advance. Payment shall be made by wire transfer to the account specified in Exhibit B.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Each party shall maintain the confidentiality of all proprietary information received from the other party for a period of five (5) years from disclosure.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.text: Neither party shall be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages. The total aggregate liability of either party shall not exceed the total License Fees paid in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

clauses.title: Acceptance Testing
clauses.text: Upon delivery of any Software update or new module, the Licensee shall have fifteen (15) business days to conduct acceptance testing. If the Software fails acceptance testing, the Licensor shall correct deficiencies within ten (10) business days.

version_history.author: Drafter
version_history.change_summary: Drafter adds warranty clause and modifies support response time.

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.text: In this Agreement, 'Licensor' means AlphaCode Inc, 'Licensee' means BetaApps LLC, 'Software' means the enterprise resource planning platform described in Exhibit A, and 'License Fee' means the annual fee specified in Section 3.

clauses.title: License Grant
clauses.text: The Licensor grants the Licensee a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Software for the Licensee's internal business operations for the duration of this Agreement.

clauses.title: License Fees
clauses.text: The Licensee shall pay the License Fee of $50,000 per annum, due within thirty (30) days of each anniversary of the Effective Date. Late payments shall accrue interest at 1.5% per month.

clauses.title: Technical Support
clauses.text: The Licensor shall provide Level 1 through Level 3 technical support during extended business hours (8 AM to 8 PM EST, Monday through Friday) with a maximum initial response time of two (2) hours for critical issues and eight (8) hours for non-critical issues.

clauses.title: Term and Termination
clauses.text: This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for an initial term of three (3) years. Either party may terminate this Agreement upon ninety (90) days written notice.

clauses.title: Payment Processing
clauses.text: All invoices issued under this Agreement shall be paid within fourteen (14) business days of receipt. The Licensor shall issue invoices quarterly in advance. Payment shall be made by wire transfer to the account specified in Exhibit B.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Each party shall maintain the confidentiality of all proprietary information received from the other party for a period of five (5) years from disclosure.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.text: Neither party shall be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages. The total aggregate liability of either party shall not exceed the total License Fees paid in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

clauses.title: Acceptance Testing
clauses.text: Upon delivery of any Software update or new module, the Licensee shall have fifteen (15) business days to conduct acceptance testing. If the Software fails acceptance testing, the Licensor shall correct deficiencies within ten (10) business days.

clauses.title: Warranty
clauses.text: The Licensor warrants that the Software shall perform substantially in accordance with the specifications in Exhibit A for a period of twelve (12) months from delivery.

version_history.author: Counterparty
version_history.change_summary: Counterparty adds indemnification clause and modifies warranty period.

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.text: In this Agreement, 'Licensor' means AlphaCode Inc, 'Licensee' means BetaApps LLC, 'Software' means the enterprise resource planning platform described in Exhibit A, and 'License Fee' means the annual fee specified in Section 3.

clauses.title: License Grant
clauses.text: The Licensor grants the Licensee a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Software for the Licensee's internal business operations for the duration of this Agreement.

clauses.title: License Fees
clauses.text: The Licensee shall pay the License Fee of $50,000 per annum, due within thirty (30) days of each anniversary of the Effective Date. Late payments shall accrue interest at 1.5% per month.

clauses.title: Technical Support
clauses.text: The Licensor shall provide Level 1 through Level 3 technical support during extended business hours (8 AM to 8 PM EST, Monday through Friday) with a maximum initial response time of two (2) hours for critical issues and eight (8) hours for non-critical issues.

clauses.title: Term and Termination
clauses.text: This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for an initial term of three (3) years. Either party may terminate this Agreement upon ninety (90) days written notice.

clauses.title: Payment Processing
clauses.text: All invoices issued under this Agreement shall be paid within fourteen (14) business days of receipt. The Licensor shall issue invoices quarterly in advance. Payment shall be made by wire transfer to the account specified in Exhibit B.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Each party shall maintain the confidentiality of all proprietary information received from the other party for a period of five (5) years from disclosure.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.text: Neither party shall be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages. The total aggregate liability of either party shall not exceed the total License Fees paid in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

clauses.title: Acceptance Testing
clauses.text: Upon delivery of any Software update or new module, the Licensee shall have fifteen (15) business days to conduct acceptance testing. If the Software fails acceptance testing, the Licensor shall correct deficiencies within ten (10) business days.

clauses.title: Warranty
clauses.text: The Licensor warrants that the Software shall perform substantially in accordance with the specifications in Exhibit A for a period of twenty-four (24) months from delivery.

clauses.title: Indemnification
clauses.text: The Licensor shall indemnify and hold harmless the Licensee from any third-party claims arising from the Licensor's breach of this Agreement or infringement of intellectual property rights.

version_history.author: Drafter
version_history.change_summary: Drafter adds entire agreement clause and accepts final form.
